title: hieracium mougeotii subsp. iricum
intro: Hieracium mougeotii subsp. iricum is a subspecies of the Hieracium genus, commonly known as hawkweed, which is a type of flowering plant. It is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and supporting the immune system. Hieracium mougeotii subsp. iricum can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, to harness its medicinal properties.
